meta.generatedNote: Catalog built from the verified live folder listing (not only the READMEs). Paths are relative to rootPath; full URL = repoBaseUrl + path.

frameworks.agent-framework: Microsoft Agent Framework (also supports AutoGen & Semantic Kernel)
frameworks.bring-your-own: Bring Your Own (CrewAI, OpenAI Agents SDK, Claude Agent SDK, custom)

protocols.responses: OpenAI-compatible Responses protocol — platform manages history, streaming, background
protocols.invocations: Invocations protocol — arbitrary JSON in/out, custom streaming and sessions
protocols.invocations_ws: Invocations WebSocket protocol — real-time bidirectional audio/voice
protocols.a2a: Agent-to-Agent protocol — delegation between hosted agents
protocols.activity: Activity protocol — Microsoft Teams / M365 channel

samples.title: Basic Agent
samples.description: A minimal agent demonstrating request/response interaction and multi-turn conversations using previous_response_id. The recommended first agent.

samples.title: Local Tools
samples.description: Register and invoke custom local tool functions (e.g. a weather lookup) alongside the LLM.

samples.title: MCP Tools
samples.description: Connect to a remote MCP server (e.g. GitHub) to consume external MCP tools, retrieval, and more.

samples.title: Foundry Toolbox
samples.description: Use an Azure Foundry Toolbox for managed tool access; provision the toolbox and query available tools at runtime.

samples.title: Workflows
samples.description: Compose a multi-step orchestrated workflow, chaining prompts/agents into a sequential pipeline.

samples.title: Files
samples.description: Handle files uploaded to the session and reason over their contents.

samples.title: Skills
samples.description: Native file-based Agent Framework skills: skill discovery plus a script-backed PDF travel-guide skill.

samples.title: Teams / M365 (Activity)
samples.description: Publish the agent to Microsoft Teams / M365. Answers Teams & calendar questions via Work IQ tools and accepts message file attachments.

samples.title: Observability
samples.description: Add logging, metrics, and distributed tracing that flow to Application Insights.

samples.title: Declarative Customer Support
samples.description: A multi-turn customer-support triage workflow authored entirely in YAML, invoking specialist Foundry agents via InvokeAzureAgent with conversation-aware routing.

samples.title: Downstream Azure Services
samples.description: Call Azure Blob Storage and Service Bus using the agent's per-agent Microsoft Entra identity and Azure RBAC — no connection strings or shared keys.

samples.title: Azure AI Search RAG
samples.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation grounded in documents indexed in an Azure AI Search index.

samples.title: Foundry Skills
samples.description: Upload SKILL.md files to the Foundry Skills REST API and download them at startup, decoupling tone/policy guidelines from agent code.

samples.title: Foundry Memory
samples.description: Persistent semantic memory backed by an Azure AI Foundry Memory Store (FoundryMemoryProvider) to remember user facts across sessions.

samples.title: Browser Automation
samples.description: Browser automation via Foundry Toolbox and the Browser Automation tool (Azure Playwright Service): general browsing, web scraping, and form filling.

samples.title: Agent Optimizer: Travel Approver
samples.description: A travel-request approval agent wired for the Foundry Agent Optimizer; optimizes instructions, skills, and tool descriptions against an evaluation dataset.

samples.title: Content Safety Guardrail
samples.description: Attach a Responsible AI content-safety guardrail so the platform screens prompts and responses against your safety policy.

samples.title: Foundry IQ Knowledge Base
samples.description: Answer questions from a Foundry IQ knowledge base (Azure AI Search agentic retrieval) reached through a Foundry Toolbox MCP endpoint using keyless agent identity.

samples.title: Basic Invocations Agent
samples.description: Minimal Invocations-protocol agent showing the invocations handler pattern with session state via agent_session_id in URL params / response headers.

samples.title: A2A Delegation
samples.description: A Responses caller delegates over A2A to a Responses executor exposed as an A2A endpoint (Foundry incoming A2A) via a Foundry Toolbox a2a_preview tool over a RemoteA2A connection.

samples.title: LangGraph Chat
samples.description: Minimal LangGraph agent with two local tools (get_current_time, calculator); multi-turn conversation via previous_response_id. The recommended first LangGraph agent.

samples.title: LangGraph Toolbox
samples.description: A LangGraph agent wired to a Foundry Toolbox exposing web_search plus a connection-backed GitHub Copilot MCP tool, with OAuth consent surfacing.

samples.title: LangGraph MCP
samples.description: A LangGraph agent that loads tools from a remote MCP server (default: GitHub Copilot MCP) via langchain_mcp_adapters MultiServerMCPClient.

samples.title: LangGraph Workflows
samples.description: A custom StateGraph chaining three specialized LLM nodes — slogan writer, legal reviewer, formatter — each seeing only the previous agent's output.

samples.title: LangGraph Files
samples.description: A LangGraph agent with local filesystem tools and a Foundry-Toolbox code_interpreter for session-uploaded files.

samples.title: LangGraph Human-in-the-Loop
samples.description: A StateGraph that drafts a proposal and pauses for human approval via langgraph.types.interrupt, serialized as mcp_approval_request + function_call output items.

samples.title: LangGraph Observability
samples.description: A LangGraph agent with GenAI OpenTelemetry tracing via enable_auto_tracing(), emitting spans, metrics, and logs to Application Insights.

samples.title: LangGraph Chat (Invocations)
samples.description: Minimal LangGraph agent with local tools; session state via agent_session_id (URL param / x-agent-session-id header) backed by a LangGraph checkpointer.

samples.title: LangGraph A2A Delegation
samples.description: A concierge LangGraph agent delegates math questions over A2A to a math-expert that publishes an incoming A2A endpoint + agent card, wired via a RemoteA2A connection and an a2a_preview Toolbox loaded over MCP.

samples.title: BYO Hello World
samples.description: Minimal BYO agent — calls a Foundry model via the Responses API and returns the reply. The simplest possible BYO starting point.

samples.title: BYO LangGraph Chat
samples.description: A LangGraph conversational agent hosted on Foundry with multi-turn history over the Responses protocol.

samples.title: BYO Notetaking Agent
samples.description: An agent that takes and retrieves notes using a custom tool.

samples.title: Session Multiplexing
samples.description: Multiple callers share one agent_session_id while previous_response_id history stays scoped by platform user context.

samples.title: BYO Toolbox
samples.description: A BYO agent wired to a Foundry Toolbox MCP endpoint for tool access.

samples.title: Background Agent
samples.description: Long-running background processing with async execution.

samples.title: Env Vars Agent
samples.description: Reads env vars injected by Foundry's connection-templated secret resolver (ApiKey + CustomKeys connections) with a kind-aware secret-safety policy.

samples.title: BYO Browser Automation
samples.description: Browser automation using Toolbox MCP for session lifecycle and playwright-cli for browser commands; supports multi-session, form filling, and web scraping.

samples.title: OpenAI Agents SDK
samples.description: Host an agent built with the OpenAI Agents SDK on Foundry over the Responses protocol.

samples.title: BYO LangGraph Toolbox
samples.description: A LangGraph agent wired to a Foundry Toolbox over the Responses protocol.

samples.title: BYO LangGraph Toolbox (User Identity)
samples.description: A LangGraph + Foundry Toolbox agent that accesses tools using on-behalf-of user identity.

samples.title: Agent Optimizer: Hello World
samples.description: A minimal BYO agent wired for the Foundry Agent Optimizer.

samples.title: Agent Optimizer: Customer Support
samples.description: A customer-support agent configured for the Foundry Agent Optimizer.

samples.title: BYO Invocations Hello World
samples.description: Minimal invocations agent — arbitrary JSON in, streaming SSE out. The simplest possible BYO invocations starting point.

samples.title: BYO LangGraph Chat (Invocations)
samples.description: A LangGraph conversational agent over the Invocations protocol with client-managed sessions.

samples.title: BYO Notetaking (Invocations)
samples.description: A note-taking agent using the Invocations protocol.

samples.title: BYO Toolbox (Invocations)
samples.description: A BYO invocations agent wired to a Foundry Toolbox MCP endpoint.

samples.title: AG-UI
samples.description: A Pydantic AI agent exposed over the AG-UI streaming protocol via the Invocations endpoint.

samples.title: GitHub Copilot
samples.description: An agent built on the GitHub Copilot SDK, using GitHub Copilot as the AI backbone.

samples.title: BYO Human-in-the-Loop
samples.description: A long-running agent that pauses for human approval before continuing.

samples.title: Event Grid Trigger
samples.description: Event-driven agent: Azure Storage triggers Event Grid which delivers to the hosted agent (authenticated by the system topic's managed identity); it summarizes a new blob and writes the summary to a sibling Storage container.

samples.title: Claude Agent SDK
samples.description: A getting-started agent using the Claude Agent SDK with streaming over the Invocations protocol, configured for Microsoft Foundry mode by default.

samples.title: Diagnostic Agent
samples.description: A no-LLM diagnostic agent that runs DNS/TCP/TLS/HTTP probes and returns a structured reachability report describing what the runtime sandbox can reach — ideal for debugging BYO networking.

samples.title: Voice Live Hello World (WebSocket)
samples.description: The smallest invocations_ws agent (~250 lines): bridges each browser WebSocket to an Azure Voice Live session (STT + LLM + TTS). Recommended WebSocket starting point.

samples.title: Pipecat over WebSocket
samples.description: Real-time voice agent on pipecat: Azure Fast Transcription then two Azure OpenAI sub-agents (greeter + check-order) then Azure TTS, streaming mic/bot PCM over the WebSocket.

samples.title: Pipecat with WebRTC
samples.description: The same multi-agent pipecat bot, but the WebSocket is signaling-only; audio flows over a negotiated WebRTC peer connection with TURN credentials.

samples.title: LiveKit Voice Agent
samples.description: A voice agent on the LiveKit Agents framework with Azure STT/LLM/TTS; the WebSocket returns LiveKit room credentials and media flows browser to LiveKit to agent.

samples.title: Duplex Live (Foreground + Background)
samples.description: A real-time Voice Live agent with two parallel tracks: a low-latency foreground router plus autonomous background workers for multi-step tasks.

samples.title: Voice Live: Foreground + Background (Responses)
samples.description: A Responses-protocol Voice Live agent that runs parallel foreground and background agents.

samples.title: Voice Live: LangGraph Handoff (Responses)
samples.description: A LangGraph Responses agent with agent handoff, made compatible with Azure Voice Live.

samples.title: Voice Live: Hello World (Invocations)
samples.description: A minimal Invocations agent compatible with Azure Voice Live (input_audio.transcription in, output_audio_transcription SSE out).

samples.title: Voice Live: Hotel Booking (Invocations)
samples.description: A hotel-booking Invocations agent driven by real-time voice through Azure Voice Live.

samples.title: Voice Live Client (shared)
samples.description: A shared Voice Live client (voicelive_client.py) that connects to a deployed Responses agent for a real-time voice conversation. This is a client, not a deployable agent.
